creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can you still reproduce this issue on 8.1-RC2? 
It seems you got all 0s ethernet address which seems to be a bug. 
Would you try the patch at the following URL and see whether it 
extract correct ethernet address? 
http://people.freebsd.org/~yongari/bge/bge.eaddr.patch 

I'm not sure whether the issue you're suffering from came from all 
0s ethernet address though.
